title: Loop Memory entry (v2 — §4.4 substrate)
description: Front-matter shape for <app>/memory/entries/<id>.md (plan §4.4). Loop Memory is the institutional-memory SUBSTRATE (not a third loop): cross-loop lessons persisted as md files, read at ingress, written at close; feeds both the Auto Loop and the Delivery Loop + fold-back. Storage is just files — no storage service. Selection is deterministic tag/scope match (+ optional LLM relevance). HARD (Constitution §1.7): store GENERALIZABLE heuristics, NOT case-specific input→output (that is the eval-phrase-encoding forbidden item); load-bearing changes (skill/charter/prompt) stay human-approved (Auto Loop §3.3); a calibration-note MUST be tagged by (provider, model).

id.description: Stable entry id; the entry lives at memory/entries/<id>.md and is referenced by [[links]].

type.description: Entry kind (plan §4.4). Reuses Δ-9 OBS triage + lessons taxonomy.

scope.description: What the entry applies to; drives deterministic ingress selection by tag/scope match.

module.description: Module(s) the lesson is scoped to.

role.description: Role(s) the lesson is injected for at ingress.

layer.description: Δ-9 fix layer(s) the lesson concerns.

maturity.description: Δ-9 OBS triage maturity. L1 = candidate (single observation); L2 = confirmed (n≥2 occurrences or human-flagged). Promotion L1→L2 happens at close.

occurrences.description: How many loops have observed this lesson; n≥2 is the L1→L2 promotion trigger (alongside human-flag).

provider.description: REQUIRED-by-convention for type=calibration-note: the provider the note is tagged to (calibration is per-(provider,model); §3.6).

model.description: REQUIRED-by-convention for type=calibration-note: the model the note is tagged to.

source_loops.description: loop_id(s) (Audit Spine) the lesson was distilled from. Threads memory back to the auditable record.

links.description: [[wiki-style]] links to related memory entries / docs.
